scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check:core: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n lint,lint:libs,typecheck,magic-numbers,replit-independence,migration-guards,spinner-contrast,production-image,types-mirror,schema-drift "pnpm run check:lint" "pnpm run check:lint:libs" "pnpm run check:typecheck" "pnpm run check:magic-numbers" "pnpm run check:replit-independence" "pnpm run check:migration-guards" "pnpm run check:spinner-contrast" "pnpm run check:production-image" "pnpm run check:types-mirror" "pnpm run check:schema-drift"
scripts.check: sh -c 'pnpm run check:all-cached || { pnpm run check:selective && pnpm run check:all-cached:write; }'
